Nikhil A P

Ph.D. Scholar in Applied Mathematics
Indian Institute of Space Science and Technology (IIST), Trivandrum

I am a Ph.D. scholar in Applied Mathematics at IIST, working under the supervision of Prof. T. G. Deepak. My research develops analytical frameworks for Markov fluid queueing models with vacation policies and their applications in renewable energy systems, and electric vehicle charging infrastructure. I am actively seeking postdoctoral positions to expand my work at the intersection of stochastic processes and sustainable energy systems.

LinkedIn Google Scholar ORCID GitHub

Accepted
